mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_member m, bnc_company c WHERE
m.${searchType} like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' AND
m.memb_id = c.cmpy_memb_id
SELECT * FROM bnc_member m, bnc_company c WHERE m.memb_id = c.cmpy_memb_id AND m.memb_id = #{memb_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bnc_member m, bnc_company c WHERE c.cmpy_memb_id = #{memb_id}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_member_log WHERE meml_id = #{memb_id}
